name: BOUNDARY_SYNC: Multi-Agent Representational Coupling (2607.01600)
content: As large language models (LLMs) are deployed as communicating agents, does inter-agent communication cause outputs to converge? We introduce BOUNDARY_SYNC, a protocol measuring representational coupling via the Coupling Amplification Factor (CAF = JSD_cond / JSD_baseline), where CAF < 1 indicates homogenization and CAF > 1 indicates diversification. In controlled GPT-4o experiments (N=30, ~9,900 API calls), we measure coupling in text and image communication. Key findings: (1) text communication
summary: 在大规模语言模型作为通信代理被部署的情况下，相互之间的交流是否会导致输出趋同？我们引入了BOUNDARY_SYNC协议，通过Coupling Amplification Factor (CAF = JSD_cond / JSD_baseline) 来测量表示耦合。CAF < 1 表示趋同，CAF > 1 表示多样化。
key_insights: 文本通信导致显著的趋同（CAF=0.803 [0.740, 0.873]），且在无交流对照和提示扰动控制下得到证实。
图像通信也遵循内部模态基准线，在这种情况下，CAF=0.834 [0.811, 0.858]，与比例效应相当。
群体规模影响耦合方向：K=5时产生趋同，而K=3时得到CAF > 1.0（点估计值为1.14和1.06）的结果，暗示向多样化方向的转变。
xihe_relevance: 对曦和的潜在价值有待评估
